name: aastephan/startcrm
description: StartCRM - CRM simple en PHP et CodeIgniter 4

setup: @php -r "echo PHP_EOL . '----------------------------------------' . PHP_EOL; echo 'StartCRM setup completed.' . PHP_EOL; echo 'If Apache cannot write to writable run:' . PHP_EOL; echo 'sudo chown -R www-data:www-data writable' . PHP_EOL; echo '----------------------------------------' . PHP_EOL;"
